title: Serious incident notifications: 2024 to 2025
body: "This annual release contains statistics on serious incidents involving children that local authorities have notified the Child Safeguarding Practice Review Panel about.   Notifiable serious incidents are those that involve death or serious harm to a child where abuse or neglect is known or suspected, and any death of a looked-after child. "

taxons.title: Data collection for safeguarding and child protection
